name: EMSON.COM
message: [AI generated] EMSON.COM, formally known as E. Mishan and Sons, Inc. (Emson), is a New York-based company specialized in the direct response industry. Founded in 1946, Emson has its roots in importing, marketing, and distributing a broad array of consumer products. They're notable for several successful "As Seen on TV" products, and they offer items across categories like home, hardware, beauty, electronics, and more.
